overall.description: Third-person game footage of an armored character walking through a desolate desert wasteland with scattered rock formations and distant smoke plumes. The scene features a monochromatic sepia color grade with dim, atmospheric lighting suggesting a post-apocalyptic or fantasy setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert wasteland with scattered boulders

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily through flat desert terrain toward distant landmarks

entered.detail: flat sandy ground with subtle cracks and ripples extending to horizon
cluster of dark jagged rocks and small boulders
hazy silhouette of low hills against dark sky
dark smoke rising faintly on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an expansive desert landscape with flat sandy terrain. Scattered rock formations appear on the right side while distant mountains loom ahead. A faint plume of smoke is visible far in the distance against the dark overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert path passing large rock outcrop

events.description: large rock formation emerges on left side of frame

agents.ego_description: character continues walking forward, passing between rock formations on either side

entered.detail: tall rugged rock outcrop with rough texture passing by on left
scattered medium-sized boulders on right side of path

segments.scene_description: The character walks past a prominent large rock formation on the left while navigating through scattered boulders. The distant smoke plume grows slightly larger in the frame as the character progresses through the rocky desert terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky desert approach toward smoke source

events.description: dark smoke clouds become prominently visible and closer ahead

agents.ego_description: character walking toward the smoke source through increasingly rocky terrain

entered.detail: dark billowing smoke and dust clouds rising close to the path
dense field of large rocks and boulders on left side

segments.scene_description: Having passed the large rock formation, the character approaches an area with prominent dark smoke clouds billowing on the right. The terrain becomes more densely scattered with boulders as the character continues toward the smoke source in the desolate wasteland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate desert wasteland that gradually shifts from an open sandy expanse to a boulder-strewn landscape dominated by billowing smoke. It begins with the character traversing flat sandy terrain under a dark overcast sky, with scattered rock formations to the right and a faint plume of smoke visible in the far distance. As the character progresses, the camera moves past a prominent large rock formation on the left while navigating through an increasing number of scattered boulders. The scene then shifts as the distant smoke grows larger in the frame, eventually leading the character toward dense, dark smoke clouds billowing on the right. Finally, the terrain becomes more heavily cluttered with rocks as the character pushes deeper into the wasteland toward the source of the smoke.
